name: analyze_voice
description: Analyze a Twitter/X account's posting style and create a voice profile. Extracts length patterns, tone markers, topics, engagement patterns, signature phrases, and writing style. Use this when you need to understand how someone writes on X before generating content that matches their voice. For generating posts after analysis, use generate_post instead.

tweets.description: Number of tweets to analyze (default: 50, minimum recommended: 30)

input.description: Read tweets from a file instead of fetching (alternative to username)

output.description: Output JSON file path for the voice profile

name: generate_post
description: Generate X/Twitter posts that match an analyzed voice profile. Creates authentic posts that mimic the account holder's unique writing style including tone, humor, length, and signature phrases. Use this after analyzing an account with analyze_voice. For account analysis, use analyze_voice first.

profile.description: Path to voice profile JSON file (from analyze_voice)

account.description: Twitter username to analyze if no profile exists (alternative to profile)

topic.description: Topic or subject for the generated posts

type.description: Post type template: hot-take, observation, meme, reaction, question, or thread

batch.description: Path to file with multiple topics (one per line) for batch generation

output.description: Output JSON file path for generated posts
